name: Select

unions.name: Filter
unions.comment: Filter - bring your own with parent msg. Others to come.

unions.name: ParentMsg
unions.comment: Return msgs for your application to respond to

unions.name: SearchQuery
unions.comment:
Select input's search query

  - Basic will search label fields on items
  - HttpQuery provide a req and decoder and it will update details
  - CustomQuery -> As it sounds

aliases.name: Item
aliases.type: { id : String.String, label : String.String, identity : item, isSelectable : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: Model
aliases.type: { label : String.String, selected : Maybe.Maybe (Select.Item item), toItem : item -> Select.Item item, search : Select.Search item msg, mode : Select.OpenState, autocompleteIndex : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int, minimumSearchTermsLength : Basics.Int, maximumSearchResults : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int, showClearButton : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: Search
aliases.type: { filters : Select.Filters item msg, terms : Maybe.Maybe String.String, items : List.List (Select.Item item), results : RemoteData.WebData (Select.Items item), query : Select.SearchQuery item msg, debouncer : Debouncer.Basic.Debouncer (Select.Msg item msg) (Select.Msg item msg) }

values.name: addClearButton
values.comment:
Config change to display (or not) the clear button.
Default is True
values.type: Basics.Bool -> Select.Model item msg -> Select.Model item msg

values.name: addDebounceInterval
values.comment: Add a SearchQuery for usage when search input changes
values.type: Basics.Int -> Select.Model item msg -> Select.Model item msg

values.name: addFilter
values.comment:
Initialise select input with a filter

      basicInit yourArgs
      |> addFilter (Select.CustomFilter yourView)
values.type: Select.Filter item msg -> Select.Model item msg -> Select.Model item msg

values.name: addItems
values.type: List.List (Select.Item item) -> Select.Model item msg -> Select.Model item msg

values.name: addMaxSearchResults
values.comment:
Config change to min length of search terms
Default is 0
values.type: Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int -> Select.Model item msg -> Select.Model item msg

values.name: addMinSearchTerms
values.comment:
Config change to min search results before running query
Default is 0
values.type: Basics.Int -> Select.Model item msg -> Select.Model item msg

values.name: addSearchQuery
values.comment: Add a SearchQuery for usage when search input changes
values.type: Select.SearchQuery item msg -> Select.Model item msg -> Select.Model item msg

values.name: addSelectedItem
values.type: Select.Item item -> Select.Model item msg -> Select.Model item msg

values.name: init
values.comment: Minimum model creation. This will be split out into 'RequiredModel' in future
values.type: String.String -> (item -> Select.Item item) -> Select.Model item msg

values.name: isOpen
values.comment: Check if selector is open or not

values.name: update
values.comment: Update function in future it will have a third el to its tuple for synchronisation
values.type: Select.Msg item msg -> Select.Model item msg -> Select.Return item msg

values.name: view
values.type: Select.Model item msg -> Html.Html (Select.Msg item msg)
